title: KOR Activewear
subtitle: Custom e-commerce infrastructure circumventing slow legacy storefronts.
about:
What is KOR Activewear?

A rapidly scaling apparel brand needing a storefront capability exceeding standard Shopify template limitations, requiring deeply integrated headless operations.

challenge.title: The Challenge: Monolithic E-Commerce Limitations
challenge.description: Existing platforms strictly locked down customization, leading to poor brand expression and sluggish checkout waterfalls.

cards.title: Rigid Architectures
cards.description: Unable to implement custom inventory tracking or split-payment logic.

cards.title: Poor SEO
cards.description: Heavy monolith footprints tanked core web vitals.

solution.title: Our Solution: Headless API Integrations
solution.description: Decoupled the frontend visual layer entirely from the backend payment and inventory mechanics.

features.title: Server-Side Generation
features.description: Blazing fast product pages pre-rendered directly on edge networks.

features.title: Custom Cart State
features.description: Flawless, optimistic cart updates allowing users to add/remove instantly.

techStack.title: Our Tech-Stack: Edge E-Commerce
techStack.description: Scalable stacks designed for Black Friday traffic spikes.

categories.name: Framework
categories.description: Next.js providing edge-routing, SSG, and ISR for real-time inventory adjustments.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Deep REST integrations with fulfillment and payment processors.

results.title: Optimized Checkouts
results.description: Cart abandonment dropped drastically with faster optimistic UI states.

results.title: Bespoke Branding
results.description: Unshackled from themes, the site accurately reflects high-end aesthetic goals.
